title: Rail Bridges
description: Data-driven generation of roads, rails, tracks, and bridges.
body:
A small mod heavily inspired by The Lost Cities by u/McJty.

Bridges generate over configurable biomes, in a loose grid pattern. Grid size can be configured. Some bridges are fully intact, others have fragments missing or themselves may only be loose fragments - the frequency of this is configurable. All datapack driven - so the bridges could carry rails, roads, or whatever.

By default, a demo set of vanilla rail bridges are generated. An official datapack for Create tracks is included. Guides on datapack building will be forthcoming.
